item.name: Serpent Warsteed Horn
item.description: A hollowed beastkin horn adorned in Twin Adder yellow that emits a deep bellowing tone which summons your Serpent warsteed.

mount.name: Serpent Warsteed
mount.action: Summon forth your Order of the Twin Adder-issued warhorse and try to push from your mind the fact that your chocobo is sitting somewhere hungry and alone.
mount.description: After witnessing dazzling demonstrations of how a warsteed might turn the tide of battle, the Grand Companies of Eorzea emptied their coffers at the feet of the Far Eastern uma bugyo, each seeking to put themselves at an advantage during Frontline campaigns.
mount.tooltip:
Hoof to neigh, Eorzea
knows not the horse for
one reason: the horsebird.
- Uma Bugyo

obj.n: A Line in the Glade IV
